modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error opening Office file from OneDrive due to sign-in issue

full_description_text: 
I was trying to open a file from my OneDrive in Office 365, but I got this annoying error. It said "Upload Blocked You are required to sign in to upload your changes to this location." I thought I was already signed in, but maybe I need to check my account settings or something. It's frustrating because I need to make changes to the document right away.
